narrative: Iran-Strait of Hormuz tensions drive risk-off into the Tokyo open — crude bid likely to sustain CAD, AUD. EUR/USD closed Friday at 1.1726; ECB hold on April 30 removes near-term downside risk but Fed-ECB 175bp differential caps upside. JPY watch: BoJ meeting on April 28 — any hawkish surprise would pressure USD/JPY from Friday's 159.33 close.
